name: Rev Low Fat Milk
long_description:
At Pauls we love dairy. We're pretty passionate about making great tasting products packed with real dairy goodness. We put that devotion into every Pauls milk, cream, custard and yoghurt we make.
Pauls Rev is a natural source of calcium, protein, vitamins and minerals, which are important for good nutrition, while also being lower in fat, making it a great choice for you and your family.
Made from Australian Milk.
  • Australian Milk

  • Good source of calcium

  • Source of Protein

  • 6 vitamins and minerals

  • Low fat milk

name: Light Start Milk
long_description:
Pura Light Start milk is low in fat and naturally provides 8 essential nutrients to support a healthy mind and body: 

  • Protein - for muscle growth, development and repair 
  • Calcium and phosphorous - for strong bones and teeth 
  • Iodine and vitamin B5 - for healthy brain and cognitive function 
  • Potassium - for muscle function and hydration 
  • Vitamin B2 and B12 - for energy maintenance and immune support 
    Consume as part of a varied diet.

    5 health star rating. 

    Proudly Australian owned and supporting local Australian dairy farming communities, choose high quality, nutritious and delicious milk from PURA.
  • Australian milk

  • Fresh milk

  • From Australian farmers

  • Rich in calcium

  • Natural source of protein

  • High quality.

  • Nutritious and delicious milk.

  • Low fat, less calories.

At Pauls, we love Dairy. We're pretty passionate about making great tasting products packed with real dairy goodness. We put that devotion into every Pauls milk, cream, custard and yoghurt we make.
Pauls PhysiCAL Milk has 40% more calcium than regular milk, plus added Vitamin D to aid calcium absorption. Just 2 glasses of PhysiCAL provides 100% of your daily calcium requirements.
#Including Pauls PhysiCAL with Vitamin D as part of a varied and healthy diet aids calcium absorption.
  • 40% more calcium than regular milk

  • Source of Vitamin D

  • Made from Australian Milk

  • Provides 100% of your daily calcium requirements

  • Good Source of Calcium

  • Low Fat Milk.

name: Unsweetened Almond Milk
long_description:
Every whole almond that makes this milk great is grown in Australia

Beneath the watchful eyes of Aussie farmers, every sun-kissed whole almond squeezed into our Almond Milk Unsweetened was picked at just the right moment to end up in your hands.
For us, it's a daily obsession that's been growing across the globe since the Vitasoy brand first started in 1940. Bringing you a simple yet delicious almond milk, brimming with the good stuff- and no added sugar.

This is why our glass is always full.

Grown by Aussie Farmers
Our whole almonds are harvested from February to April and delivered to our Wodonga factory.
Only the best almonds make it...

Blended by us
We soak our almonds until they're ready to be ground, and then blend the good bits with filtered water and other ingredients including calcium.
Perfected and packed for your fridge...

Enjoyed by you
Your Vitasoy is ready to be soaked up and savoured with all your favourites.

- Australian grown whole almonds.
- Naturally free from gluten, dairy, lactose, cholesterol and soy.
- Natural source of vitamin E.
- 1/3 of your daily calcium needs in every serving.
- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives
- Non-genetically modified.
- Suitable For vegans and vegetarians.
ingredients: Filtered water, almonds (min. 3.3%), gum arabic, acidity regulators (potassium phosphate, sodium bicarbonate), mineral (calcium phosphate), emulsifier (sunflower lecithin), sea salt, gellan gum.

name: Soy Milk Calci-plus
long_description:
Made with 100% Australian Grown soy beans and with 50% of your daily calcium needs in every serving, Vitasoy Calci-Plus is a natural source of protein. With no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives, it is suitable for vegans and vegetarians.

Enjoy with your bowl of cereal, in a smoothie or simply on its own!
  • 50% of your daily calcium
ingredients: Filtered water, Australian whole soybeans (min. 15%), barley flour, raw sugar, barley malt, sunflower oil, minerals (calcium phosphate, calcium carbonate), sea salt, vitamins (vitamin D, vitamin A, vitamin B12, vitamin B2).
allergens:
Contains Barley, Gluten, Soy
Free From Milk
country_of_origin: Made in Australia from at least 97% Australian ingredients

Deliciously creamy, and with none of the thickeners and gums that you see in some almond milks. Just simple and natural ingredients.

name: Soy Milky Low Sugar 2% Fat
description: VITASOY SOY MILKY LOW SUGAR 2% FAT 1L
long_description:
Every whole soybean that makes this milk great is grown in Australia
Beneath the watchful eyes of Aussie farmers, every whole soybean squeezed into our Soy Milky was planted and picked at just the right moment. It's why our great milky taste is hard to beat.

For us, it's a daily obsession that's been growing across the globe since the Vitasoy brand first started in 1940. Bringing you a simple yet delicious soy milk, brimming with the good stuff-and less than 2% Fat.

This is why our glass is always full.

Grown by Aussie Farmers
Our whole soybeans are harvested from February to April and delivered to our Wodonga factory.
Only the best beans make it...

Blended by us
We dehull and grind our beans, then blend the good bits with filtered water and other ingredients including calcium.
Perfected and packed for your fridge...

Enjoyed by you
Your Vitasoy is ready to be soaked up and savoured with all your favourites.

- Australian grown whole soybeans.
- 1/3 of your daily calcium needs in every serving.
- Naturally free from gluten, dairy, lactose and cholesterol.
- Natural source of protein.
- No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives.
- Non-genetically modified.
- Suitable For vegans and vegetarians.

The protein in this product is derived from Australian grown whole soybeans. It may appear as white sediment so make sure you shake the product well before consuming it.
ingredients: Filtered water, whole soybeans (min.14%), raw sugar, mineral (calcium phosphate), natural flavour, sea salt.

- no artificial colours
- low fat
- no preservatives
- gluten free
- Made fresh in Australia daily
- low lactose
For everybody, every day.

name: Kefir Natural Yoghurt
long_description:
Table of Plenty Probiotic Natural Kefir is a slow-fermented pourable kefir yoghurt. With 10 culture strains and over 90 billion live cultures in every serve, it's a delicious way to create a healthier, happier gut.


Pleasantly tart with a hint of natural fizz, our live natural probiotic kefir is made with fresh milk from grass-fed Gippsland cows, just as nature intended.


Being traditionally slow fermented means all the good bits stay inside the bottle. Because our live probiotic kefir is made with fresh milk and is slow fermented in the bottle, it can get a little lumpy (just like life)! Simply give it a good shake to make it deliciously creamy again!


Enjoy as a great alternative to milk and yoghurt or perfectly paired with all your favourite breakfasts. You can use kefir on its own as a nutritious drink, add it to smoothies, dollop onto your favourite muesli or use it in recipes such as pancakes. The options are endless!

  • 90+ billion live friendly bacteria
  • 10 culture strains
  • Fresh milk kefir
  • Slow fermented
  • No added sugar
ingredients: Fresh Milk, Live Cultures, Live Probiotic Cultures.

Table of Plenty Probiotic Lactose Free Kefir is a natural slow-fermented, pourable kefir yoghurt. With 10 culture strains and over 90 billion live cultures in every serve, it's a delicious way to create a healthier, happier gut.


Pleasantly tart with a hint of natural fizz, our kefir is made with fresh milk from grass-fed Gippsland cows, just as nature intended.


Being traditionally slow fermented means all the good bits stay inside the bottle. Because our live probiotic kefir is made with real milk and is slow fermented in the bottle, it can get a little lumpy (just like life)! Simply give it a good shake to make it deliciously creamy again!


Kefir is a great alternative to milk and yoghurt and our Lactose Free Kefir is perfect as a lactose free substitute. You can use kefir on its own as a nutritious drink, add it to smoothies, dollop onto your favourite muesli or use it in recipes such as pancakes - the options are endless!

  • Monash FODMAP certified
  • 90+ billion live friendly bacteria
  • 10 culture strains
  • Fresh milk kefir
  • Slow fermented
  • No added sugar

name: Kefir Golden Chai
description: TABLE OF PLENTY KEFIR GOLDEN CHAI 1KG
long_description:
Support your gut health with Table of Plenty Golden Chai Turmeric & Honey Kefir... a probiotic rich kefir yogurt made from fresh Australian milk and slow fermented to deliver over 90 billion live friendly bacteria and 10 live culture strains per serve.



This creamy, gut-friendly kefir is infused with the warming flavours of golden chai, a touch of natural honey flavour, and the goodness of turmeric. Crafted from real milk with no powders or artificial nasties, it is a wholesome way to enjoy the benefits of probiotics and kefir every day.




  • Probiotic kefir yogurt with 90+ billion live cultures per serve

  • Supports gut health with 10 live culture strains

  • Slow fermented for optimal probiotic benefits

  • Made from real milk (no powders)

  • With turmeric, natural honey flavour, and chai spices

  • Source of protein and calcium

  • Contains prebiotics to support digestion


Real lumps, real kefir!

Because our kefir is made with real milk and slow fermented, it can get a little lumpy (just like life!). Shake well to make it smooth and creamy.


Enjoy it over muesli, in smoothies, or straight from the tub, and give your gut some love with every spoonful of this naturally probiotic rich kefir yogurt.
ingredients: Fresh Milk (95%), Sugar, Prebiotics (<2%) [Citrus Fibre, Prebiotic Dietary Fibre (Chicory)], Chai Spices (<2%) [Turmeric (<1%), Cinnamon], Natural Honey Flavour (<1%), Probiotic Live Cultures (<2%).

name: Probiotic Filmjolk Yoghurt Natural
long_description:
Filmjolk is a traditional cultured yoghurt from Sweden that dates back to the Viking days. Made with fresh milk sourced from local Gippsland farms, our probiotic yoghurt is slow fermented the authentic Swedish way.

With 15 live and active cultures and 50+ billion good bacteria per serve, probiotic yoghurt helps maintain healthy gut flora and regulate your digestive system.

Natural probiotic yoghurt with 15 cultures and probiotics.

50+ billion good bacteria

15 live cultures & probiotics

Fresh yoghurt

For digestive health

Pourable texture and mild flavour

For our full range of products & more, visit our website www.rokebyfarms.com.au and follow us @rokebyfarms

name: No Added Sugar Protein Yoghurt Pouch Strawberry
description: FARMERS UNION NO ADDED SUGAR PROTEIN YOGHURT POUCH STRAWBERRY 150G
long_description:
Fuel your day with the goodness of Farmers Union Greek Style High Protein Strawberry Yogurt-a deliciously smooth yogurt crafted for those who want more from every squeeze. From Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt* comes a fruity, high-protein option that's as enjoyable to eat as it is good for you.

Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved - this yogurt, made with strawberry puree, is a deliciously simple snack.

Each convenient single-serve 150 g pouch delivers a powerful 15 g of protein^ with 9 essential amino acids, helping you stay fuller for longer and support muscle maintenance and growth#. With no added sugar, low fat, and a naturally rich source of calcium, it's the perfect on-the-go snack - whether you're starting your morning or recharging after a workout. 

Whether you're chasing fitness goals or simply love the taste of authentic Greek-style yogurt with a fruity twist, Farmers Union delivers quality and flavour in every squeeze.

So go on-squeeze it, enjoy it, and fuel up on the move...because something this good shouldn't be overthought.

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25

#As part of a balanced diet, protein helps you feel fuller for longer compared to low protein foods and supports muscle health.

^Protein values can vary based on natural seasonal variations.

  • High in whole protein - 15 g per serve^

  • 5 Star Health Rating

  • No added sugar

  • All 9 Essential Amino Acids

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours, Preservatives or Sweeteners

  • Low in fat.

  • Live cultures (S. thermophilus and L. bulgaricus).

  • Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved.

name: Thick & Creamy Yoghurt Mango & Finger Lime
description: DAIRY FARMERS THICK & CREAMY YOGHURT MANGO & FINGER LIME 140G
long_description:
Experience the indulgence of Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Mango & Finger Lime, now crafted with our new, even thicker and creamier recipe. Our velvety signature yoghurt delivers a rich, smooth taste that elevates every spoonful.

Blended with juicy mango and a subtle touch of finger lime, it brings a flavour that's tropical and indulgent-bright yet creamy, refreshing yet gourmet, and unmistakably Dairy Farmers.

With our upgraded formula comes refreshed packaging, proudly highlighting its Thicker & Creamier taste so you can spot your favourite pot instantly on shelf.

Proudly Australian made and owned since 1900, it's perfect for breakfast, a wholesome snack, or an effortlessly delicious dessert.

name: Pot Set Yoghurt Vanilla
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk and cream from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

Made with fresh dairy milk, live probiotic cultures and natural vanilla flavour, Jalna Creamy Vanilla Yoghurt is a family favourite. Made in the same natural pot set way, it delivers the perfect blend of vanilla and cream. Perfect with so many desserts or enjoy on its own.

100% All Natural

3 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made

siggi's. Simple ingredients, not a lot of sugar (at least 25% less sugar than the average of the top 3 leading fruit yoghurt brands: Siggi's at 7-9 vs. 10-16g per 100g).

Siggi.

  • No gluten.

  • No preservatives.

  • No stevia.

  • No sucralose..

  • No artificial colours..

name: Flip Cookies & Cream Crunch Yoghurt
description: CHOBANI FLIP YOGHURT COOKIES CREAM:.:140 GRAM
long_description:
Nothing says snack-time like creamy Chobani Greek Yogurt paired with a side of crave-worthy crunch. Our Chobani Flip range is deliciously designed to curb those 3pm cravings with the perfect better-for-you snack.

At Chobani we believe yogurt should be simple: just milk and cultures, which we strain using a centuries-old authentic process to make it deliciously thick. It takes 3 cups of milk to make 1 cup of Chobani Yogurt which is why it's so creamy and packed with protein.

No preservatives, artificial colours or flavours.

High in natural protein

To discover our full range of products & more, visit chobani.com.au

Experience the indulgence of Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Mango Passionfruit, now crafted with our new, even thicker and creamier recipe. Our velvety signature yoghurt delivers a rich, smooth taste that elevates every spoonful.

Blended with mango and passionfruit, it brings a flavour that's both tropical and indulgent-bright yet creamy, refreshing yet gourmet, and unmistakably Dairy Farmers.

With our upgraded formula comes refreshed packaging, proudly highlighting its Thicker & Creamier taste so you can spot your favourite pot instantly on shelf.

Proudly Australian made and owned since 1900, it's perfect for breakfast, a wholesome snack, or an effortlessly delicious dessert.

name: Thick & Creamy Yoghurt Choc Flakes
description: DAIRY FARMERS THICK & CREAMY YOGHURT CHOC FLAKES 140G
long_description:
High quality chocolate flakes swirled in the creamiest Aussie yoghurt. It's a sensory delight!

Sink your spoon into something truly special. Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Choc Flakes is a sensorial delight-where the creamiest Aussie yoghurt meets delicate flakes of high-quality chocolate in a swirl of indulgence. Each spoonful is a moment to savour: smooth, velvety yoghurt made with Australian milk, lovingly folded with rich chocolate pieces that melt and crunch in perfect harmony. It's a treat that feels both nostalgic and new, comforting yet exciting.

The texture is everything you'd expect from Dairy Farmers-thick, luscious, and luxuriously creamy. It wraps around the chocolate flakes like a warm hug, creating a contrast that's both satisfying and moreish. Crafted with care and 98% Australian ingredients, this yoghurt is a celebration of simple pleasures done exceptionally well. Whether you're winding down after a long day, sneaking a quiet moment to yourself, or simply craving something decadent, Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Choc Flakes is your go-to indulgence. It's the kind of yoghurt that doesn't just satisfy-it spoils you, in the best possible way.

  • High-quality chocolate flakes

  • Made with creamy Aussie yoghurt

  • Sensorial delight

  • Thick and luscious texture

  • Crafted with 98% Australian ingredients

  • Perfect for indulgent moments.

  • Nostalgic yet exciting.

  • Lovingly folded chocolate pieces.
ingredients: MILK, WATER, CREAM (MILK), MILK SOLIDS, SUGAR, DARK CHOCOLATE (1.2%), THICKENERS (1442, XANTHAN GUM), NATURAL FLAVOURS, ACIDITY REGULATORS (SODIUM CITRATE, CITRIC ACID), LIVE YOGHURT CULTURES (MILK) (S. THERMOPHILUS, B. LACTIS, L. ACIDOPHILUS, L. BULGARICUS).

name: No Added Sugar Protein Yoghurt Pouch Mango
description: FARMERS UNION NO ADDED SUGAR PROTEIN YOGHURT POUCH MANGO 150G
long_description:
Fuel your day with the goodness of Farmers Union Greek Style High Protein Mango Yogurt-a deliciously smooth yogurt crafted for those who want more from every squeeze. From Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt* comes a fruity, high-protein option that's as enjoyable to eat as it is good for you.

Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved - this yogurt, made with mango puree, is a deliciously simple snack.

Each convenient single-serve 150 g pouch delivers a powerful 15 g of protein^ with 9 essential amino acids, helping you stay fuller for longer and support muscle maintenance and growth#. With no added sugar, low fat, and a naturally rich source of calcium, it's the perfect on-the-go snack - whether you're starting your morning or recharging after a workout. 

Whether you're chasing fitness goals or simply love the taste of authentic Greek-style yogurt with a fruity twist, Farmers Union delivers quality and flavour in every squeeze.

So go on-squeeze it, enjoy it, and fuel up on the move...because something this good shouldn't be overthought.

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25

#As part of a balanced diet, protein helps you feel fuller for longer compared to low protein foods and supports muscle health.

^Protein values can vary based on natural seasonal variations.

  • High in whole protein - 15 g per serve^

  • 5 Star Health Rating

  • No added sugar

  • All 9 Essential Amino Acids

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours, Preservatives or Sweeteners

  • Low in fat.

  • Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved.

  • Live cultures (S. thermophilus and L. bulgaricus).
ingredients: Milk Solids, Skim Milk, Water, Cream (Milk), Mango Puree (3.7%), Thickener (1442), Natural Flavour, Natural Colour (160a), Natural Sweetener (Steviol Glycosides), Live Yogurt Cultures (Milk), (S. Thermophilus, L Bulgaricus).

name: Thick & Creamy Strawberry Yoghurt
description: DAIRY FARMERS THICK & CREAMY YOGHURT STRAWBERRY
long_description:
Experience the indulgence of Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Strawberry, now crafted with our new, even thicker and creamier recipe. Our velvety signature yoghurt delivers a rich, smooth taste that elevates every spoonful.

Blended with ripe, juicy strawberries, it brings a flavour that's both nostalgic and indulgent-fresh yet creamy, familiar yet gourmet, and unmistakably Dairy Farmers.

With our upgraded formula comes refreshed packaging, proudly highlighting its Thicker & Creamier taste so you can spot your favourite pot instantly on shelf.

Proudly Australian made and owned since 1900, it's perfect for breakfast, a wholesome snack, or an effortlessly delicious dessert.

  • Made with the generosity of the country, Dairy Farmers yoghurt is made with real and luscious fruit stirred through full cream milk and creamy yoghurt.

  • It's made with with yoghurt cultures, has no artificial colours and flavours or preservatives, and is gelatine free.

  • It's a source of calcium and protein.

  • It's available in both the 150 gms and 600 gms pack size and can be enjoyed with breakfast, as a snack or for dessert.

  • It's made in Victoria, Australia.

  • Proudly Australian Made & Owned.

name: Greek Style No Added Sugar Protein Yoghurt Vanilla
description: FARMERS UNION GREEK STYLE NAS PROTEIN YOGHURT VANILLA 150G
long_description:
Fuel your day with the goodness of Farmers Union Greek Style High Protein Vanilla Yogurt-a deliciously smooth yogurt crafted for those who want more from every spoonful. From Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt* comes a high-protein option with real vanilla bean that's as enjoyable to eat as it is good for you.

Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved - this yogurt, made with vanilla bean, is a deliciously simple snack.

Each convenient single-serve 150 g tub delivers a powerful 15 g of protein^ with 9 essential amino acids, helping you stay fuller for longer and support muscle maintenance and growth#. With no added sugar, low fat, and a naturally rich source of calcium, it's the perfect on-the-go snack - whether you're starting your morning or recharging after a workout. 

Whether you're chasing fitness goals or simply love the taste of authentic Greek-style yogurt with vanilla bean, Farmers Union delivers quality and flavour in every spoonful.

So go on-dive straight in... because something this good shouldn't be overthought.

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25

#As part of a balanced diet, protein helps you feel fuller for longer compared to low protein foods and supports muscle health.

^Protein values can vary based on natural seasonal variations.

  • High in whole protein - 15 g per serve^

  • 5 Star Health Rating

  • No added sugar

  • All 9 Essential Amino Acids

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours, Preservatives or Sweeteners

long_description:
Indulgence doesn't get more Aussie than this. Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Salted Caramel is a luxurious blend of velvety, thick yoghurt made with the creamiest Australian milk, layered with golden salted caramel crafted using premium salt. It's a flavour that's both familiar and elevated-sweet, rich, and perfectly balanced with a hint of savoury depth. Every spoonful is a moment to savour, wrapping you in comfort and delivering a taste that feels like a warm embrace.

The texture is everything you'd expect from Dairy Farmers-thick, luscious, and unapologetically creamy. It's the kind of yoghurt that invites you to slow down, take a breath, and enjoy something truly special.

Crafted with 98% Australian ingredients and generations of dairy expertise, this yoghurt is a celebration of simple pleasures done exceptionally well. Whether you're winding down after a long day or treating yourself to a quiet moment, Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Salted Caramel is your go-to indulgence. It's not just yoghurt-it's a little luxury in every tub

  • Velvety, thick yoghurt made with Australian milk

  • Golden salted caramel layer

  • Perfectly balanced flavour

  • Thick and luscious texture

  • Crafted with 98% Australian ingredients

  • Generations of dairy expertise.

  • Ideal for moments of indulgence.

  • A little luxury in every tub.

name: No Added Sugar Protein Yoghurt Pouch Blueberry
description: FARMERS UNION NO ADDED SUGAR PROTEIN YOGHURT POUCH BLUEBERRY 150G
long_description:
Fuel your day with the goodness of Farmers Union Greek Style High Protein Blueberry Yogurt-a deliciously smooth yogurt crafted for those who want more from every squeeze. From Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt* comes a fruity, high-protein option that's as enjoyable to eat as it is good for you.

Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved - this yogurt, with blueberry puree, is a deliciously simple snack.

Each convenient single-serve 150 g pouch delivers a powerful 15 g of protein^ with 9 essential amino acids, helping you stay fuller for longer and support muscle maintenance and growth#. With no added sugar, low fat, and a naturally rich source of calcium, it's the perfect on-the-go snack - whether you're starting your morning or recharging after a workout. 

Whether you're chasing fitness goals or simply love the taste of authentic Greek-style yogurt with a fruity twist, Farmers Union delivers quality and flavour in every squeeze.

So go on-squeeze it, enjoy it, and fuel up on the move...because something this good shouldn't be overthought.

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25

#As part of a balanced diet, protein helps you feel fuller for longer compared to low protein foods and supports muscle health.

^Protein values can vary based on natural seasonal variations.

  • High in whole protein - 15 g per serve^

  • 5 Star Health Rating

  • No added sugar

  • All 9 Essential Amino Acids

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours, Preservatives or Sweeteners

  • Low in fat.

  • Live cultures (S. thermophilus and L. bulgaricus).

  • Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved.

name: Greek Yoghurt Lactose Free
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

Now everybody can enjoy our delicious yoghurt with the Jalna Lactose Free Range. Giving you the goodness of dairy like calcium, protein and probiotic benefits, but without any lactose. It's perfect for lactose sensitive tummies and it tastes delicious, plus it's FODMAP friendly.

Delightful in a bowl by itself or on fresh fruit, it's a delicious yoghurt the whole family will enjoy, made the traditional pot set way.

It comes in 1kg Greek, Natural and Vanilla.

100% All Natural

5 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made
ingredients: Whole Milk, Cream (from Milk), Enzyme (Lactase), Live Cultures (from Milk) (Lactobacillus Acidophilus, Bifidobacterium Lactis, Lacticaseibacillus Casei), Synbio (Lacticaseibacillus Rhamnosus IMC 501, Lacticaseibacillus Paracasei IMC 502))

long_description:
Delicate lemon flavour stirred through Dairy Farmers full cream milk and creamy yoghurt for a thick, creamy and very tasty result!

Proudly working with farming communities to create high quality and nutritious dairy products. Australian made, owned and loved, Dairy Farmers yoghurt has been proudly nourishing Australian families since 1900. 

Enjoy delicious Dairy Farmers Yoghurt with breakfast, as a protein snack or even for dessert!

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives 
  •  Gelatine free
  • Source of calcium and protein

    Illustrations by Carla Ellis

name: Greek Style No Added Sugar Protein Yoghurt Strawberry
description: FARMERS UNION GREEK STYLE NAS PROTEIN YOGHURT STRAWBERRY 150G
long_description:
Fuel your day with the goodness of Farmers Union Greek Style High Protein Strawberry Yogurt-a deliciously smooth yogurt crafted for those who want more from every spoonful. From Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt* comes a fruity, high-protein option that's as enjoyable to eat as it is good for you.

Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved - this yogurt, made with strawberry puree, is a deliciously simple snack.

Each convenient single-serve 150 g tub delivers a powerful 15 g of protein^ with 9 essential amino acids, helping you stay fuller for longer and support muscle maintenance and growth#. With no added sugar, low fat, and a naturally rich source of calcium, it's the perfect on-the-go snack - whether you're starting your morning or recharging after a workout. 

Whether you're chasing fitness goals or simply love the taste of authentic Greek-style yogurt with a fruity twist, Farmers Union delivers quality and flavour in every spoonful.

So go on-dive straight in... because something this good shouldn't be overthought.

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25

#As part of a balanced diet, protein helps you feel fuller for longer compared to low protein foods and supports muscle health.

^Protein values can vary based on natural seasonal variations.

  • High in whole protein - 15 g per serve^

  • 5 Star Health Rating

  • No added sugar

  • All 9 Essential Amino Acids

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours, Preservatives or Sweeteners

  • Low in fat.

  • Live cultures (S. thermophilus and L. bulgaricus).

  • Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved.

name: No Added Sugar Protein Yoghurt Pouch Vanilla
description: FARMERS UNION NO ADDED SUGAR PROTEIN YOGHURT POUCH VANILLA 150G
long_description:
Fuel your day with the goodness of Farmers Union Greek Style High Protein Vanilla Yogurt-a deliciously smooth yogurt crafted for those who want more from every squeeze. From Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt* comes a high-protein option with real vanilla bean that's as enjoyable to eat as it is good for you.

Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved - this yogurt, made with vanilla bean, is a deliciously simple snack.

Each convenient single-serve 150 g pouch delivers a powerful 15 g of protein^ with 9 essential amino acids, helping you stay fuller for longer and support muscle maintenance and growth#. With no added sugar, low fat, and a naturally rich source of calcium, it's the perfect on-the-go snack - whether you're starting your morning or recharging after a workout. 

Whether you're chasing fitness goals or simply love the taste of authentic Greek-style yogurt with vanilla bean, Farmers Union delivers quality and flavour in every squeeze.

So go on-squeeze it, enjoy it, and fuel up on the move...because something this good shouldn't be overthought.

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25

#As part of a balanced diet, protein helps you feel fuller for longer compared to low protein foods and supports muscle health.

^Protein values can vary based on natural seasonal variations.

  • High in whole protein - 15 g per serve^

  • 5 Star Health Rating

  • No added sugar

  • Real vanilla bean

  • All 9 Essential Amino Acids

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours, Preservatives or Sweeteners.

  • Low in fat.

  • Live cultures (S. thermophilus and L. bulgaricus).
ingredients: Milk Solids, Skim Milk, Water, Cream (Milk), Thickener (1442), Natural Flavour, Vanilla Bean (0.01%), Acidity Regulators (330, 331), Salt, Natural Sweetener (Steviol Glycosides), Live Yogurt Cultures (Milk), (S. Thermophilus, L Bulgaricus).

name: Organic Yoghurt Vanilla Bean
long_description:
PAPER-BASED TUB* Help remove single-use plastic.
At five:am organic, we are dedicated to a more sustainable future. Our grass-fed dairy cows roam freely in open pastures, untouched by synthetic chemicals and pesticides. We select only the highest quality natural ingredients to craft our delicious organic yoghurts. Now, we're taking steps to reduce plastic from our packaging. Our goal is to remove over 100 tonnes of virgin plastic from our packaging each year - that's equivalent to the weight of 160 organic dairy cows!

*sides coated with non-paper based material.

#compared to equivalent five:am 700g Tub sold prior to September 2024.

  • Certified Organic

  • 3 Health Star Rating

  • Synthetic Chemical Free

  • Free Range Grass Fed Cows

  • 15g of high-quality protein

  • 0 Added Sugar

  • 5 Star Health Rating

*Good source of protein, which contributes to the growth of muscle mass, and naturally occurring vitamin B12, which contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue when consumed as part of a healthy diet.

 

Enjoy it as a quick snack, post-workout boost, or part of a balanced meal. YoPro Strawberry delivers the taste you love with the nutrition you need.

Ideal for: Fitness enthusiasts, on-the-go snacking, protein-rich diets

name: Thick & Creamy Caramelised Fig Yoghurt
description: DF THICK & CREAMY YOGHURT CARAMELISED FIG 600G
long_description:
Experience the indulgence of Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Caramelised Fig, now crafted with our new, even thicker and creamier recipe. Our velvety signature yoghurt delivers a rich, smooth taste that elevates every spoonful.

Blended with caramelised fig, it brings a flavour that's both homely and indulgent-comforting yet gourmet, and unmistakably Dairy Farmers.

With our upgraded formula comes refreshed packaging, proudly highlighting its Thicker & Creamier taste so you can spot your favourite pot instantly on shelf.

Proudly Australian made and owned since 1900, it's perfect for breakfast, a wholesome snack, or an effortlessly delicious dessert.

  • Made with the generosity of the country, Dairy Farmers yoghurt is made with real and luscious fruit stirred through full cream milk and creamy yoghurt.

  • It's made with with yoghurt cultures, has no artificial colours and flavours or preservatives, and is gelatine free.

  • It's a source of calcium and protein.

  • It's available in a range of flavours including the limited-edition provenance range, generously filled with delicious provenance fruits.

  • It's available in both the 150 gms and 600 gms pack size and can be enjoyed with breakfast, as a snack or for dessert.

  • It's made in Victoria, Australia.

We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk and cream from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

Enjoy it straight off the spoon, dollop on fruit or cereal, blend in smoothies or substitute for ice-cream.

100% All Natural

3 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made

name: Greek Style Yogurt
long_description:
Naturally providing a good source of calcium with no added sugar, Farmers Union Greek Style Yogurt is Australia's favourite  Greek Style Yogurt.

Delicious and creamy, it's the perfect accompaniment to meals and snacks. Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved. 

Once you've finished a delicious tub of Farmers Union, simply clean and use the empty tub to store your food. Repurposing our packaging to help you not only store your leftovers, but reinvent them into something delicious using our yogurt!

 

  • Signature Farmers Union Greek Style taste & creamy texture

  • Made with just milk, cream & cultures

  • No added sugar

  • Goodness of calcium

  • Free from thickeners

  • Contains live cultures.

  • Goes on, in and with everything!.

  • Australian owned and made.

name: Probiotics Yoghurt Vanilla
long_description:
Get Gut Happy! Experience the goodness of Vaalia Probiotic Yoghurt, a delicious and nutritious addition to your daily routine, which is proven to boost your digestion and immunity*.

Did you know not all yoghurts contain probiotics?
Vaalia Probiotic Yoghurt is made with a carefully selected, unique blend of probiotic cultures that support your digestive system, your immune system and contribute to overall gut wellness.

Product Features and Benefits:
- 4.5 Billions of live & active cultures'
- LGG probiotic can help strengthen your immune system.* 
- BB-12 probiotic and dietary fibre for digestive support.*
- Low fat.
- Source of prebiotic dietary fibre.
- Source of protein.
- High source of calcium.

- No artificial colours.
- No preservatives.
- Gelatin free.

*As part of a varied and healthy diet, LGG and BB-12 probiotics in Vaalia yoghurt at a daily intake of at least 1 billion CFU each can strengthen the immune system and improve bowel function in the general adult population, also with dietary fibre for regularity.
'Per serve
LGG and BB-12 are registered trademarks of Chr. Hansen. Test.

name: Thick & Creamy Yoghurt Strawberry
long_description:
Experience the indulgence of Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Strawberry, now crafted with our new, even thicker and creamier recipe. Our velvety signature yoghurt delivers a rich, smooth taste that elevates every spoonful.

Blended with ripe, juicy strawberries, it brings a flavour that's both nostalgic and indulgent-fresh yet creamy, familiar yet gourmet, and unmistakably Dairy Farmers.

With our upgraded formula comes refreshed packaging, proudly highlighting its Thicker & Creamier taste so you can spot your favourite pot instantly on shelf.

Proudly Australian made and owned since 1900, it's perfect for breakfast, a wholesome snack, or an effortlessly delicious dessert.

  • Made with the generosity of the country, Dairy Farmers yoghurt is made with real and luscious fruit stirred through full cream milk and creamy yoghurt.

  • It's made with with yoghurt cultures, has no artificial colours and flavours or preservatives, and is gelatine free.

  • It's a source of calcium and protein.

  • It's available in a range of flavours including the limited-edition provenance range, generously filled with delicious provenance fruits.

  • It's available in both the 150 gms and 600 gms pack size and can be enjoyed with breakfast, as a snack or for dessert.

  • It's made in Victoria, Australia.
ingredients: YOGHURT WITH FRUIT INGREDIENTS: MILK, CONCENTRATED SKIM MILK, CREAM (MILK), SUGAR, STRAWBERRIES (7%), THICKENER (1442), NATURAL FALVOURS, MINERAL SALT (509), COLOUR (CARMINES), LEMON JUICE CONCENTRATE, LIVE YOGHURT CULTURES (MILK) (S. THERMOPHILUS, L. BULGARICUS). CONTAINS MILK

name: Greek Style Sweet & Creamy Yoghurt
description: JALNA GREEK STYLE YOGHURT SWEET & CREAMY 1KG
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk and cream from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

All the qualities you love about our award-winning Greek Yoghurt, but with the perfect balance of sweetness. That's what you'll find in every delicious pot of Jalna Greek Sweet & Creamy Yoghurt. Made in the same natural pot set way and full of live probiotics cultures, it's less acidic than traditional Greek yoghurt and ideal for the whole family. Enjoy straight off the spoon, or as a tasty addition to your favourite dessert recipes or fresh fruit and berries.

100% All Natural

3 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made

name: Probiotics Yoghurt Natural
long_description:
Billions of reasons to love your gut.

Only Vaalia's deliciously creamy yoghurt contains this unique combination of probiotics, to boost your gut health and immunity when enjoyed daily*.

- Probiotics LGG, BB-12 and LA-5
- Source of prebiotic dietary fibre
- Source of protein
- High source of calcium
- Low fat
- No preservatives
- Gluten free - Gelatine free
- No artificial colours or sweeteners

*As part of a varied and healthy diet, LGG and BB-12 probiotics in Vaalia yoghurt at a daily intake of at least 1 billion CFU each can strengthen the immune system and improve bowel function in the general adult population, also with dietary fibre for regularity.
LGG and BB-12 are registered trademarks of Chr. Hansen.

  • - No artificial colours or sweeteners - No preservatives.

name: Thick & Creamy Yoghurt Strawberry
description: DAIRY FARMERS THICK & CREAMY YOGHURT STRAWBERRY
long_description:
Experience the indulgence of Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Strawberry, now crafted with our new, even thicker and creamier recipe. Our velvety signature yoghurt delivers a rich, smooth taste that elevates every spoonful.

Blended with ripe, juicy strawberries, it brings a flavour that's both nostalgic and indulgent-fresh yet creamy, familiar yet gourmet, and unmistakably Dairy Farmers.

With our upgraded formula comes refreshed packaging, proudly highlighting its Thicker & Creamier taste so you can spot your favourite pot instantly on shelf.

Proudly Australian made and owned since 1900, it's perfect for breakfast, a wholesome snack, or an effortlessly delicious dessert.

  • - Made with the generosity of the country, Dairy Farmers yoghurt is made with real and luscious fruit stirred through full cream milk and cream yoghurt.

  • It's thick & creamy and very very tasty

  • It's made with with yoghurt cultures, has no artificial colours and flavours or preservatives, and is gelatine free.

  • It's a source of calcium and protein.

  • Available in a range of multipack flavours including Strawberry, Vanilla and Mango & Passionfruit. Also available in the singles ( 150 gms) and take home( 600 gms) pack format.

  • It's made in Victoria, Australia.
ingredients: YOGHURT WITH FRUIT MILK, CONCENTRATED SKIM MILK, CREAM (MILK), SUGAR, STRAWBERRIES (7%), THICKENER (1442), NATURAL FLAVOURS, MINERAL SALT (509), COLOUR (CARMINES), LEMON JUICE CONCENTRATE, LIVE YOGHURT CULTURES (MILK) (S.THERMOPHILUS, L.BULGARICUS). CONTAINS MILK

name: Greek Style Natural Yoghurt
description: JALNA GREEK STYLE DY YOGHURT:NATURAL GREEK:.:1 KG
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk and cream from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

With only 3 natural ingredients, our award winning all-natural Greek Yoghurt is made without the need for stabilisers. Fresh milk and a generous amount of cream is fermented with live cultures to produce a full-bodied, smooth yoghurt with the perfect amount of tang.

With a uniquely thick and creamy texture, it is delicious straight off the spoon, served with fruit, or as a versatile ingredient when cooking.

100% All Natural

3 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made
ingredients: Whole Milk, Cream (from Milk), Live Cultures (from Milk) (Lactobacillus Acidophilus, Bifidobacterium Lactis, Lactobacillus Casei)

long_description:

Made in Australia.

4 Health Star Rating.

As part of a balanced diet, Yoplait naturally provides essential nutrients for a healthy mind and body:

- Protein - for muscle growth, development and repair 
- Calcium and phosphorous - for strong bones and teeth 
- Iodine and vitamin B5 - for brain health
- Potassium - for muscle function and hydration 
- Vitamin B2 - for energy maintenance 
Vitamin B12 - for immune support 

*Circana Total Business, Top 10 Brands by volume (litres 000), MAT to 26.03.23

name: Lactose Free Yoghurt Greek Natural
description: JALNA LACTOSE FREE YOGHURT GREEK NATURAL 1KG
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

Now everybody can enjoy our delicious yoghurt with the Jalna Lactose Free Range. Giving you the goodness of dairy like calcium, protein and probiotic benefits, but without any lactose. It's perfect for lactose sensitive tummies and it tastes delicious, plus it's FODMAP friendly.

Delightful in a bowl by itself or on fresh fruit, it's a delicious yoghurt the whole family will enjoy, made the traditional pot set way.

It comes in 1kg Greek, Natural and Vanilla.

100% All Natural

5 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made
ingredients: Whole Milk, Cream (from Milk), Enzyme (Lactase), Live Cultures (from Milk) [Lactobacillus Acidophilus, Bifidobacterium Lactis, Lactobacillus Casei, Synbio (Lactobacillus Rhamnosus, Lactobacillus Paracasei)]

name: Greek Style Natural Yoghurt
long_description:
Naturally providing a good source of calcium with no added sugar, Farmers Union Greek Style Yogurt is Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt*.

Delicious and creamy, it's the perfect accompaniment to meals and snacks. Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved. 

Once you've finished a delicious tub of Farmers Union Greek Stye All Natural Yoghurt, simply clean and use the empty tub to store your food. Repurposing our packaging to help you not only store your leftovers, but reinvent them into something delicious using our yogurt!

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25.
  • Signature Farmers Union Greek Style taste & creamy texture

  • Made with just milk, cream & cultures

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • No added sugar

  • Goodness of Calcium

  • Gelatine free.

  • Australian Owned & Made.

name: No Added Sugar Organic Yoghurt Greek Style
description: FIVEAM NO ADDED SUGAR ORGANIC YOGHURT GREEK STYLE 700G
long_description:
PAPER-BASED TUB* Help remove single-use plastic.
At five:am organic, we are dedicated to a more sustainable future. Our grass-fed dairy cows roam freely in open pastures, untouched by synthetic chemicals and pesticides. We select only the highest quality natural ingredients to craft our delicious organic yoghurts. Now, we're taking steps to reduce plastic from our packaging. Our goal is to remove over 100 tonnes of virgin plastic from our packaging each year - that's equivalent to the weight of 160 organic dairy cows!

*sides coated with non-paper based material.

#compared to equivalent five:am 700g Tub sold prior to September 2024.

  • Certified Organic

  • 3 Health Star Rating

  • Synthetic Chemical Free

  • Free Range Grass Fed Cows

name: Organic Biodynamic Dairy Yoghurt Whole Milk
description: JALNA ORG BIODYNAMIC DAIRY YOGHURT WHOLE MILK
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk from the Jalna BioDynamic dairy farm, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

For over 20 years on the Jalna Farm, we've been employing BioDynamic principles that work in harmony with nature and without the use of harmful sprays and chemicals to bring you all-natural BioDynamic yoghurt. Made from Certified organic milk, Jalna BioDynamic Organic Yoghurt is a deliciously creamy yoghurt made using our traditional pot set method. It's a holistic approach that produces a wholesome, all-natural yoghurt your family will love.

Certified Organic & BioDymanic.

100% All Natural

3 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made
ingredients: Biodynamic Organic Whole Milk, Organic Milk Solids, Live Cultures (from Milk) (Lactobacillus Acidophilus, Bifidobacterium Lactis, Lactobacillus Casei)

name: Protein Yoghurt
long_description:
Fuel your day with the goodness of Farmers Union Greek Style High Protein Yogurt—a deliciously smooth yogurt crafted for those who want more from every spoonful. From Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt* comes a high-protein option that's as enjoyable to eat as it is good for you.

Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved, this yogurt harnesses the goodness of natural ingredients to create a deliciously simple yogurt you can feel good about.

Packed in a large 900 g tub, it's perfect for households, meal prep, or anyone who loves having a wholesome, high-protein staple on hand. Each 200 g serve delivers a powerful 16 g of protein^, helping you stay fuller for longer# and support muscle maintenance and growth. With no added sugar, low fat, and a naturally rich source of calcium, it's ideal for breakfast, post-workout refuelling, or adding a creamy boost to your favourite recipes.

Whether you're chasing fitness goals or simply love the taste of Greek-style yogurt, Farmers Union delivers quality and flavour in every tub. 

So go on—spoon it, mix it, or eat it straight from the tub... because something this good shouldn't be overthought.

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25

#As part of a balanced diet, protein helps you feel fuller for longer compared to low protein foods and supports muscle health.

^Protein values can vary based on natural seasonal variations.
  • 16 g of Protein Per Serve^

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours, Preservatives or Sweeteners

  • Less than 0.5% FAT

  • No added sugar

  • Live cultures (S. thermophilus and L. bulgaricus)

  • 5 Star Health Rating.

  • Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved.

  • All natural yogurt.

long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

name: Greek Style Yoghurt Natural
description: FARMERS UNION GREEK STYLE YOGHURT NATURAL
long_description:
Naturally providing a good source of calcium with no added sugar, Farmers Union Greek Style Yogurt is Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt*.

Delicious and creamy, it's the perfect accompaniment to meals and snacks. Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved. 

Once you've finished a delicious tub of Farmers Union Greek Stye All Natural Yoghurt, simply clean and use the empty tub to store your food. Repurposing our packaging to help you not only store your leftovers, but reinvent them into something delicious using our yogurt!

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25
  • Signature Farmers Union Greek Style taste & creamy texture

  • Made with just milk, cream & cultures

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • No added sugar

  • Goodness of Calcium

  • Gelatine free.

  • Australian Owned & Made.

name: Greek Style Yoghurt
long_description:
There's nowhere like the rolling hills of Tasmania's pristine Tamar Valley. We think it's the perfect place to create our range of thick and creamy yoghurts.

Tamar Valley Dairy tastes delicious because we make it in Tasmania from locally sourced fresh milk. But don't just take our word for it, taste the Tassie goodness in Tamar Valley Dairy for yourself.
  • All natural

  • Made with Tasmanian milk

  • Greek Style

  • Thick & creamy

  • Gelatine free

  • Gluten free.
ingredients: Milk, Cream (from milk), milk solids, live cultures (from Milk).

name: Thick & Creamy Yoghurt Vanilla
long_description:
Experience the indulgence of Dairy Farmers Thick & Creamy Vanilla, now crafted with our new, even thicker and creamier recipe. Our velvety signature yoghurt delivers a rich, smooth taste that elevates every spoonful.

Blended with the warm, comforting flavour of classic vanilla, it brings a taste that's simple yet indulgent-creamy, fragrant, beautifully balanced, and unmistakably Dairy Farmers.

With our upgraded formula comes refreshed packaging, proudly highlighting its Thicker & Creamier taste so you can spot your favourite pot instantly on shelf.

Proudly Australian made and owned since 1900, it's perfect for breakfast, a wholesome snack, or an effortlessly delicious dessert.

  • Made with the generosity of the country, Dairy Farmers yoghurt is made with real and luscious fruit stirred through full cream milk and creamy yoghurt.

  • It's made with with yoghurt cultures, has no artificial colours and flavours or preservatives, and is gelatine free.

  • It's a source of calcium and protein.

  • It's available in a range of flavours including the limited-edition provenance range, generously filled with delicious provenance fruits.

  • It's available in both the 150 gms and 600 gms pack size and can be enjoyed with breakfast, as a snack or for dessert.

  • It's made in Victoria, Australia.
ingredients: MILK, CONCENTRATED SKIM MILK, SUGAR, CREAM (MILK), WATER, THICKENER (1442), NATURAL FLAVOURS, LEMON JUICE CONCENTRATE, LIVE YOGHURT CULTURES (MILK) (S. THERMOPHILUS, L. BULGARICUS).

name: Yoghurt Natural
long_description:
A delicious new taste, like no other plain white yoghurt. Yoplait All Natural is smooth, creamy, and crafted with just four natural ingredients. With no added sugar and a mild, balanced flavour, it's perfect for those who find Greek yoghurt too tart. Each serve delivers 11.5g of protein and 50% of your daily calcium needs, making it a nourishing choice for the whole family.

This yoghurt is made for versatility. Stir it into breakfast bowls, blend it into smoothies, dollop it onto tacos, or use it as a creamy base for curries, dressings and baked goods. Its silky texture and clean taste make it a fridge staple that works across sweet and savoury dishes-replacing mayonnaise in sandwiches or starring in dinner recipes.

Proudly made in Australia with Australian milk and carrying a 5-star health rating, Yoplait All Natural offers everyday value without compromise. It's not just a side-it's the star of the dish, delivering a delicious new taste that's unlike any other plain white yoghurt.

  • Only 4 ingredients

  • High in Natural Protein

  • No Added Sugar

  • Low in fat

  • High in Calcium

  • 8 Essential Nutrients.

  • 11.5g of natural protein per serve..
ingredients: MILK SOLIDS, MILK, CREAM (MILK), LIVE YOGURT CULTURES (MILK) (S. THERMOPHILUS, L. BULGARICUS).

name: Dairy Yoghurt Greek Style
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk and cream from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

With only 3 natural ingredients, our award winning all-natural Greek Yoghurt is made without the need for stabilisers. Fresh milk and a generous amount of cream is fermented with live cultures to produce a full-bodied, smooth yoghurt with the perfect amount of tang.

With a uniquely thick and creamy texture, it is delicious straight off the spoon, served with fruit, or as a versatile ingredient when cooking.

100% All Natural

3 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made
ingredients: Whole Milk, Cream (from Milk), Live Cultures (from Milk)

name: Thick & Creamy Yoghurt Lemon
description: DAIRY FARMERS THICK & CREAMY YOGHURT LEMON 600 GR
long_description:
Proudly working with farming communities to create high quality and nutritious dairy products. Australian made, owned and loved, Dairy Farmers yoghurt has been proudly nourishing Australian families since 1900. 

Enjoy delicious Dairy Farmers Yoghurt with breakfast, as a protein snack or even for dessert!

  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives 
  •  Gelatine free
  • Source of calcium and protein

    Illustrations by Carla Ellis. 

     

  • Made with the generosity of the country, Dairy Farmers yoghurt is made with real and luscious fruit stirred through full cream milk and creamy yoghurt.

  • It's made with with yoghurt cultures, has no artificial colours and flavours or preservatives, and is gelatine free.

  • It's a source of calcium and protein

  • It's available in a range of flavours including the limited-edition provenance range, generously filled with delicious provenance fruits.

  • It's available in both the 150 gms and 600 gms pack size and can be enjoyed with breakfast, as a snack or for dessert.

  • It's made in Victoria, Australia.

name: Mango Yoghurt
long_description:
Made in Australia and available in 4 delicious flavours including Vanilla, Strawberry, Mango and Passionfruit.

4 Health Star Rating.

As part of a balanced diet, Yoplait naturally provides essential nutrients for a healthy mind and body:

  • Protein - for muscle growth, development and repair 
  • Calcium and phosphorous - for strong bones and teeth 
  • Iodine and vitamin B5 - for brain health
  • Potassium - for muscle function and hydration 
  • Vitamin B2 - for energy maintenance 
    Vitamin B12 - for immune support 

    *Circana Total Business, Top 10 Brands by volume (litres 000), MAT to 26.03.23
  • Made with real fruit and goodness of milk

  • loved by Australians since 1982

  • 8 essential nutrients

  • simple & delicious yoghurt for the whole family

  • no artifical flavours, colours or preservatives

  • Made in Victoria, Australia..

  • 1kg share tub for the whole family.

name: Greek Style High Protein Yoghurt Natural
description: FARMERS UNION GREEK STYLE YOGHURT HIGH PROTEIN NATURAL YOGURT
long_description:
Fuel your day with the goodness of Farmers Union Greek Style High Protein Yogurt—a deliciously smooth yogurt crafted for those who want more from every spoonful. From Australia's most loved plain Greek Style Yogurt* comes a high-protein option that's as enjoyable to eat as it is good for you.

Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved, this yogurt harnesses the goodness of natural ingredients to create a deliciously simple yogurt you can feel good about.

Available in a convenient 500 g tub, it's perfect for smaller households, quick meal prep, or anyone who loves having a wholesome, high-protein staple on hand. Each 200 g serve delivers a powerful 16 g of protein^, helping you stay fuller for longer# and support muscle maintenance and growth. With no added sugar, low fat, and a naturally rich source of calcium, it's ideal for breakfast, post-workout refuelling, or adding a creamy boost to your favourite recipes.

Whether you're chasing fitness goals or simply love the taste of Greek-style yogurt, Farmers Union delivers quality and flavour in every tub. 

So go on—spoon it, mix it, or eat it straight from the tub... because something this good shouldn't be overthought.

*Data sourced from Circana MarketEdge based on data definitions provided by Bega Dairy & Drinks, MAT ending 1/6/25

#As part of a balanced diet, protein helps you feel fuller for longer compared to low protein foods and supports muscle health.

^Protein values can vary based on natural seasonal variations.
  • 16 g of Protein Per Serve^

  • All natural yogurt

  • No Artificial Colours, Flavours, Preservatives or Sweeteners

  • Less than 0.5% FAT

  • No added sugar

  • Live cultures (S. thermophilus and L. bulgaricus).

  • 5 Star Health Rating.

  • Proudly Aussie owned, made and loved.

name: Pot Set Sweet And Creamy Greek Style Coconut Flavoured Yoghurt
description: JALNA POT SET SWEET AND CREAMY GREEK STYLE COCONUT FLAVOURED YOGHURT 1KG
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk and cream from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

Put a little bit of paradise into everyday with our Greek Sweet & Creamy Coconut flavoured yoghurt. Made with our award-winning Greek Yoghurt in the natural pot set way, it combines the perfect balance of natural coconut flavour and creamy texture. Wonderfully delicious on its own, add a spoonful to seasonal fruits or scoop into a smoothie.

100% All Natural

3 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made

name: Greek Yogurt Pouch Raspberry
long_description:
Chobani Greek Yogurt is deliciously simple. Made using just milk and cultures, which we triple strain using an authentic process so it's naturally thick and creamy, then blended with raspberry.



Strained to be naturally thick

High in natural protein

No preservatives, artificial colours or flavours

Source of calcium

Contains Live & Active Cultures

Made in Australia.

At Chobani we believe yogurt should be simple: just milk and cultures, which we strain using a centuries-old authentic process to make it deliciously thick. It takes 3 cups of milk to make 1 cup of Chobani Yogurt which is why it's so creamy and packed with protein.

No preservatives, artificial colours or flavours.

High in natural protein

To discover our full range of products & more, visit chobani.com.au

Enjoy snack time with Pauls Kids!

Pauls Birthday Cake flavoured yoghurt is a delicious, perfectly portioned snack, ready to enjoy on the go.
With dairy goodness for growing kids, Pauls Kids yoghurt contains no preservatives and no artificial colours. It's a great source of Calcium, is low in fat and is gluten-free.
Perfect for lunch boxes, snack time, or a quick pick-me-up, our yoghurt pouches are a convenient and tasty addition to any day.
  • Source of calcium

  • Contains active cultures

  • Calcium & Vitamin D for strong bones & teeth (as part of a healthy diet from a wide variety of foods for children aged 1-3)

  • No preservatives.

  • Squeezable.

  • No Spoon Required.

name: Probiotics Yoghurt No Added Sugar Berries 4x125g
description: ACTIVIA PROBIOTIC YOGHURT NO ADDED SUGAR BERRIES 4 X 125G
long_description:
Developed by Danone, Activia combines over 30 years of scientific research with innovation to deliver a yoghurt that supports digestive health every day. Only Activia contains exclusive probiotics Bifidus ActiRegularis, proven to survive the journey through the gastro intestinal tract and reach the gut microbiome alive, to provide gut health benefits.

Enjoy a deliciously creamy mixed berries yoghurt with no added sugar, no artificial sweeteners, colours, or preservatives

  • Probiotics 100X stronger

  • No added sugar

  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, or preservatives

  • Gelatine free

  • Good source of calcium

 

*Activia helps improve digestive comfort when 250g is consumed daily as part of a healthy lifestyle and balanced diet.

^Activia contains Bifidobacterium lactis CNCM I-2494. 5.6bn CFU when manufactured, with 1.6bn after stomach acid based on 160 g serve size (CFU values vary depending on serve size), compared to lactobacillus delbrueckii bulgaricus found in leading regular yoghurt without added probiotics.

^Activia contains Bifidobacterium lactis CNCM I-2494. 4.4bn CFU when manufactured, with 1.3bn after stomach acid based on 125 g serve size (CFU values vary depending on serve size). Compared to lactobacillus delbrueckii bulgaricus culture found in leading regular yoghurt without added probiotics.

  • Probiotics

  • Gut Health

  • Digestive health

  • No added sugar

  • no artificial sweeteners, no artificial colours & no preservatives

  • Gelatine free.

  • good source of calcium.
ingredients: Milk, milk solids, mixed berries (7.3%) (strawberry, blackberry, blueberry, raspberry), thickeners (1442, 407), flavour, live lactic acid cultures (milk) (Bifidobacterium animalis subspecies lactis CNCM I-2494, Streptococcus thermophilus, Lactococcus lactis and Lactobacillus bulgaricus), milk minerals, enzyme (lactase), natural colour (black carrot, blackcurrant), sweetener (steviol glycosides), lemon pulp, salt.

Made in Australia, Yoplait Zero Yoghurt contains no fat (contains less than 0.15% fat) and no added sugar.

5 Health Star Rating.

As part of a balanced diet, Yoplait naturally provides essential nutrients for a healthy mind and body:

  • Protein - for muscle growth, development and repair

  • Potassium - for muscle function and hydration 
  • Vitamin B2 - for energy maintenance 
    Vitamin B12 - for immune support

  • Rich in calcium, has the goodness of protein and is gluten free.

  • Healthy and nutritious yoghurt with a 5-health star rating that can be consumed with breakfast, as a snack or treat.

  • Made in Victoria, Australia..

name: Probiotic Yoghurt No Added Sugar Mango 4x125g
description: ACTIVIA PROBIOTIC YOGHURT NO ADDED SUGAR MANGO 4 X 125G
long_description:
Developed by Danone, Activia combines over 30 years of scientific research with innovation to deliver a yoghurt that supports digestive health every day. Only Activia contains exclusive probiotics Bifidus ActiRegularis, proven to survive the journey through the gastro intestinal tract and reach the gut microbiome alive, to provide gut health benefits.

Enjoy a deliciously creamy mango yoghurt with no added sugar, no artificial sweeteners, colours, or preservatives

  • Probiotics 100X stronger

  • No added sugar

  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, or preservatives

  • Gelatine free

  • Good source of calcium

 

*Activia helps improve digestive comfort when 250g is consumed daily as part of a healthy lifestyle and balanced diet.

^Activia contains Bifidobacterium lactis CNCM I-2494. 5.6bn CFU when manufactured, with 1.6bn after stomach acid based on 160 g serve size (CFU values vary depending on serve size), compared to lactobacillus delbrueckii bulgaricus found in leading regular yoghurt without added probiotics.

^Activia contains Bifidobacterium lactis CNCM I-2494. 4.4bn CFU when manufactured, with 1.3bn after stomach acid based on 125 g serve size (CFU values vary depending on serve size). Compared to lactobacillus delbrueckii bulgaricus culture found in leading regular yoghurt without added probiotics.

  • Probiotics

  • Gut Health

  • Digestive health

  • No added sugar

  • no artificial sweeteners, no artificial colours & no preservatives

  • Gelatine free.

  • good source of calcium.
ingredients: Milk, mango (7%), milk solids, thickener (1442), stabiliser (440), live lactic acid cultures (milk) (Bifidobacterium animalis subspecies lactis CNCM I-2494, Streptococcus thermophilus, Lactococcus lactis and Lactobacillus bulgaricus), flavour, enzyme (lactase), sweetener (steviol glycosides), milk minerals, salt, natural colour (paprika extract), lemon pulp.

name: Dairy Free Yoghurt Probiotic Low Sugar Vanilla Bean
description: COYO DAIRY FREE YOGHURT PROBIOTIC LOW SUGAR VANILLA BEAN 900G
long_description:
Your Favourite Dairy Free Yoghurt is Low in Sugar!



Our multi-award winning Dairy Free Coconut Yoghurt comes in a luscious Vanilla Bean flavour that's naturally low in sugar! Family owned and Aussie made on the pristine Sunshine Coast, we've combined unmistakable flecks of aromatic vanilla, certified organic coconut and exclusive probiotics for our signature thick and creamy COYO taste that everyone loves!



Packed with Prebiotic Fibre and Clinically Researched Probiotics.



We've partnered with Chr. Hansen to include beneficial live cultures and plant powered probiotics that help nourish your microbiome! Supported by chicory root as a source of prebiotic fibre to help the good bacteria thrive, COYO Dairy Free Yoghurt contains clinically researched probiotic strains BB-12 and L-CASEI 431.



Made with Certified Organic Coconut.



Each tub of COYO Dairy Free Yoghurt harnesses the goodness of organic coconuts so you can taste the COYO difference in every creamy dollop! Ethically farmed using permaculture principles, the farming practices of our coconuts put people, the planet, and nutrition first.



COYO is a Delicious and Easy Way to Keep Well.



For a nutritional dollop at every meal, simply just add COYO. Give your smoothies a probiotic boost, enjoy a healthful snack with a serving of fruit, replace heavy creams with fresh whipped COYO, or simply dollop on your breakfast. Get creative and remember the joy of eating and keeping well! You can discover delicious dairy-free recipes on our website.



What You Love:


Dairy Free

Low Sugar

Organic Coconut

Probiotic

Prebiotic Fibre

Certified Kosher

Aussie Made

Family Owned

Award-Winning

name: Dairy Free Yoghurt Probiotic No Added Sugar Natural
description: COYO DAIRY FREE YOGHURT PROBIOTIC NO ADDED SUGAR NATURAL 900G
long_description:
Your Favourite Natural Dairy Free Yoghurt With No Added Sugar!

COYO Dairy Free Natural Coconut Yoghurt is a much loved classic and contains no added sugar! Our master yoghurt makers have produced a deliciously silky smooth, super creamy and multi-award winning dairy free yoghurt made using certified organic coconut cream and exclusive probiotics.

Packed with Prebiotic Fibre and Clinically Researched Probiotics.

We've partnered with Chr. Hansen to include beneficial live cultures and plant powered probiotics that help nourish your microbiome! Supported by chicory root as a source of prebiotic fibre to help the good bacteria thrive, COYO Dairy Free Yoghurt contains clinically researched probiotic strains BB-12 and L-CASEI 431.

Made with Certified Organic Coconut.

Each tub of COYO Dairy Free Yoghurt harnesses the goodness of organic coconuts so you can taste the COYO difference in every creamy dollop! Ethically farmed using permaculture principles, the farming practices of our coconuts put people, the planet, and nutrition first.

COYO is a Delicious and Easy Way to Keep Well.

For a nutritional dollop at every meal, simply just add COYO. Give your smoothies a probiotic boost, enjoy a healthful snack with a serving of fruit, replace heavy creams with fresh whipped COYO, or simply dollop on your breakfast. Get creative and remember the joy of eating and keeping well! You can discover delicious dairy-free recipes at coyo.com.

What You'll Love:

Dairy Free

No Added Sugar

Organic Coconut

Probiotic

Prebiotic Fibre

Certified Kosher

Aussie Made

Family Owned

Award-Winning
ingredients: Organic Coconut Cream, Water, Starch, Chicory Root Fibre, Live Cultures & Probiotics

name: Cheese 16 Portions
long_description:
Laughing Cow Original Spreadable Cheese Wedges, 16 portions

The Laughing Cow Original triangles are mild, smooth and deliciously tasty portions of creamy cheese spread. With over 100 years of history, this iconic creamy and smooth cheese was proudly the first cheese spread to be individually served in foil sealed portions to stay fresher for longer and to help reduce food waste.
With their super convenient format, you can snack on them anytime and anywhere. They are ideal as a little cheeky snack on their own or spread on toast or a cracker. They are also perfect for cooking, and will make any dish so delicious and creamy! They are a good source of calcium and contain no added artificial flavours and colours. Because we know you can't get enough of our cheese spread, our big 16-pack is ideal for sharing with your family and friends.

Made with real cheese
Source of calcium
Suitable for vegetarians
ingredients: Rehydrated skimmed milk, cheeses (23.2%) (milk, salt, lactic acid bacteria, microbial rennet), butter (milk), milk proteins, milk mineral concentrate, emulsifier (452), lactic acid concentrate (milk). Contains milk.

name: Cheez Dippers 4 Pack
description: THE LAUGHING COW CHEEZ DIPPERS 4 PACK 140G
long_description:
LAUGHING COW CHEEZ DIPPERS 140G

Cheez Dippers are the perfect practical format for school lunchboxes and as an on-the-go snack. Crunch on the crispy breadsticks dipped in the creamy, tasty and smooth Laughing Cow cheese dip when you need a healthy and tasty snack.

The Laughing Cow has been delighting families all across the world since 1921 with our deliciously creamy spreadable cheeses.

Crispy breadsticks
Creamy cheese
Source of calcium and cereals
Convenient snacking format
For the whole family

name: Cheese 8 Portions Regular
long_description:
Laughing Cow Original Spreadable Cheese Wedges, 8 portions

The Laughing Cow Original triangles are mild, smooth and deliciously tasty portions of creamy cheese spread. With over 100 years of history, this iconic creamy and smooth cheese was proudly the first cheese spread to be individually served in foil sealed portions to stay fresher for longer and to help reduce food waste.
With their super convenient format, you can snack on them anytime and anywhere. They are ideal as a little cheeky snack on their own or spread on toast or a cracker. They are also perfect for cooking, and will make any dish so delicious and creamy! They are a good source of calcium and contain no added artificial flavours and colours. Great for the full family!

Made with real cheese
Source of calcium
Suitable for vegetarians

name: Cheese Light 8 Portion
description: THE LAUGHING COW CHEESE LIGHT 8 PORTIONS 133G
long_description:
Reduced fat cheese spread, 8 portions

The Laughing Cow Light triangles are mild, smooth and marvellously tasty portions of creamy cheese spread. They have all the delicious creaminess of The Laughing Cow Original cheese spread, but are 56% less fat and only 26kcal per triangle, making them the perfect low-calorie treat. With a creamy taste and smooth texture, these moreish cheese spread triangles pair perfectly with anything from crackers to avocados or celery. Tasty and time saving with their super convenient format, you can take them anywhere with you, and eat them on the go: they are ideal as a little cheeky snack or spread on toast or a cracker.

Source of calcium
Made with real cheese
26kcal of fat per portion
No artificial colours or flavours
Suitable for vegetarians

name: Lactose Free Block
long_description:
Philadelphia Lactose Free is made with the Enzyme Lactase which works by converting the Lactose in Milk into Galactose and Glucose making it friendly for those who are lactose intolerant. Philadelphia Lactose Free is fantastically versatile. It is your essential ingredient for a lactose free cheesecake or as an icing alternative for all your baking creations. You can also have it with crackers, use it for a creamy pasta carbonara or even for your salads
  • Deliciously Creamy

  • Philadelphia is made in Australia since 1956

  • Natural ingredients

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • Made with at least 95% Australian ingredients.
ingredients: Natural Ingredients. Milk, Cream (From Milk), Milk Solids, Salt, Vegetable Gums (Locust Bean And/Or Guar), Enzyme (Contains Lactase), Starter Culture, Processing Aids (Contain Milk).

name: Grated Parmesan Cheese
long_description:
Made from Australian milk, our Coles Grated Parmesan Cheese is packed with all the sharp, savory and nutty parmesan notes we know and love, ready to be sprinkled atop your next master meal. Unlike most big-name Parm-in-a-jar, our Coles Grated Parmesan Cheese is crafted with non-animal rennet, which makes it suitable for our vegetarian folk. Our ingredients are simple and free from potassium sorbate, a preservative often added to extend shelf-life and flavour. What you see is what you get, as it were.


Whether you plan to impress at the next BBQ gathering with an warm pumpkin salad or cook an undeniable meatball bolognese, sprinkling (or let's face it, pouring) this parmesan atop will only improve your no doubt excellent culinary creations.


A simple way to lift your mid-week meals: Parmesan-roasted potatoes


  • A simple way to lift your mid-week meals: Parmesan-roasted potatoes
  • Boil potatoes for 2 min, drain and lightly coat potatoes in oil
  • Toss potatoes into the parmesan mix (until evenly coated) and oven roast

name: Mozzarella Ball
description: LA CASA DEL FORMAGGIO MOZZARELLA BALL 250G
long_description: Mozzarella is delicious melted on pizzas and toasted focaccia rolls. It is a key ingredient in lasagnas, casseroles, pasta bakes and most other cheesy hot dishes.  Simple to use, just grate or slice, and add to your favourite dish. Mozzarella, also from the Pasta Filata family, is lower in moisture than Bocconcini. La Casa Del Formaggio's Mozzarella follows the same manufacturing process as the Bocconcini products, only it is cooked a little longer in its own whey to expel more moisture, making it one of the purest Mozzarellas on the market, with absolutely no artificial preservatives. Our Mozzarella is higher moisture than standard pizza cheese, which means it stays rich and creamy when melted at high temperatures.

name: Haloumi Lactose Free
long_description:
100% Australian Owned Haloumi!

Our Lactose Free haloumi is suitable for those who are lactose intollerant. It has the same full flavour as standard haloumi - just without the lactose.

Our Haloumi is made using the highest quality milk from our own farm, situated on the fertile banks of the Murray River at Corowa, NSW.

Haloumi Cheese is a semi-hard stretched curd cheese. It has a high melting point, so can easily be fried or grilled without melting. Its salty flavour and unique texture is delicious when barbequed, with a squeeze of lemon or added to salads or skewers, with vegetables and meat. Larger slices are great on burgers or it can be used in baking as a grated cheese on potatoes or pizzas. Endless possibilities!
  • Lactose Free Haloumi

  • 100% Australian Owned & Made

  • All Natural Ingredients

  • Fresh milk from our own farm

  • Suitable for Vegetarians

  • Halal Certified.
ingredients: Pasteurised Cow's Milk, Salt, Non-Animal Rennet, Enzyme.

Strong and disctinct flavour: sharp and punchy flavour with crumbly texture

100% New  Zealand Made: From natural ingredients and aged up to 24 months

Parmesan Cheese: Authentic texture

Versatile Block Format: Slice, cube or grate to suit your needs.

Rich, Savoury Flavour: A bold and distinctive flavour with medium strength.

Perfect Finishing Touch: Sprinkle over pasta, risotto or salads.

No Artificial Additives: Just real Italian-style cheese.

Perfect Italiano Block Traditional Parmesan brings an authentic, bold flavour to your meals. It adds rich flavour and texture to your favourite dishes. From creamy risottos to fresh garden salads to topping pastas, this authentic parmesan brings a gourmet finish in seconds.

name: Vintage Cheese Block
long_description:
Tasty Cheddar Cheese: Creamy, rich and satisfying

Strong and disctinct flavour: sharp and punchy flavour with crumbly texture

Versatile Block Format: Slice, cube or grate to suit your needs.

100% New  Zealand Made: From natural ingredients and aged up to 24 months

Easy Peel: Smooth, convenient peel-back packaging.

Mainland Vintage Aged Cheddar is robust and strong in flavour - long lasting, sharp and punchy with some savoury notes. This cheese has a crumbly, crunchy texture only achievable by maturing for a long time. All made with natural New Zealand  dairy goodness.

name: Little Entertainer Classic
long_description: Mersey Valley Classic Cheddar Cheese 80g block is best known for its strong cheddar cheese bite, unique crumbly texture and bold vintage cheddar flavour. This makes Mersey Valley Classic Cheddar Cheese perfect for a snack that really hits the spot! Mersey Valley Classic Cheddar Cheese is delicious served with gherkins, relish and torn bread. Have it on its own or with crackers as a snack, or add Mersey Valley Classic Cheddar Cheese to a cheese board, as a treat for yourself or to entertain guests. Enjoy paired with with a light craft beer or a light red wine.- 80g Cheese Block- Classic Cheddar Cheese - Bold vintage cheddar flavour - Sharp and crumbly- Delicious served with gherkins, relish and torn bread as a snack or on a cheese board when entertaining! Snack bold with Mersey Valley Classic Cheddar Cheese.

name: Sweet Chilli Sour Cream & Bell Peppers Club Cheddar Cheese
description: KENILWORH CHEDDAR SWEET CHILLI SOUR CREAM & BELL PEPPERS 165G
long_description:
A flavoursome union that balances the natural, spicy bitterness of sweet chilli and bell peppers with the cool, rich creaminess of sour cream and club cheddar.

Bold, creamy, and bursting with flavour - our Sweet Chilli, Sour Cream & Bell Pepper Club Cheddar brings the perfect kick to your cheese board or cooking adventures. A spicy, creamy combo that's anything but ordinary!

Enjoy it on its own or paired with crisp crackers, fresh veggie sticks, and mild dips. For drinks, try a chilled rose, a light lager, or a crisp Sauvignon Blanc to complement its lively flavours.

  • Australian Made

name: Signature Vintage Eddington Cheddar
long_description: Celebrating our very first wheel of cheddar crafted in 1993. We still collect fresh milk from Ashgrove family farms each day; golden, nutritious milk from free-range cows grazing on natural rye grasses found only at 41 degrees latitude. You can taste it in the strong, savoury, but never overpowering flavours that make this cheddar distinctively Ashgrove. Aged 18 to 24 months on traditional wooden planks for superb complexity and the perfect crumble.

name: Double Cream Brie
long_description:
Castello Double Cream Brie cheese is made with added cream and matured from inside out to create a beautifully soft and extra buttery taste experience. A slim rind yields easily to your knife, revealing a thick and velvety centre. Inspired by our desire to bring together the mild and delicate nature of a brie and the more creamy cheese profiles, this soft creamy mould cheese brings out the best of our passion and ingredients. Let this cheese melt in your mouth and you'll get hints of natural yoghurt and dark chocolate. Explore its abitily to melt and to add flavour to your cooking!
  • Lusciously creamy 150g half-moon of brie cheese with a thin rind

  • Matured from inside out

  • Rich and complex

  • Strength: 2 out of 6. Mild.

  • Creatively crafted in Denmark

  • Suitable for vegetarians.
